race.description: Sportsbet Up & Coming Stars Series Heat 3
race.comment: Siding with the resuming CAVALRY SCOUT (4) who looks to have trialled nicely leading in. He was right in the market on debut here and ran a solid race for fourth, perhaps a bit new on that occasion. With a bit more time to develop he can go on with it this time in. TEN WARRIORS (3) has had a stack of chances and just can't get the job done, with 9 minor placings from 13 starts. He's been running in some strong maidens however and should get his chance from the inside gate. DIRTY LOOK (10) ran a solid race on debut at Seymour, getting home well there after settling back. She should improve nicely to 1300m. WINDHOWLER (9) is a gelding by Ghaiyyath for the Hayes yard who debuts. He's won a trial leading in and looks set to measure up. CHOWDOWN (5) next best.
